facts.title: Support language
facts.body: All user-facing community and DM replies must be written in English.

facts.title: Writing style
facts.body: Do not use the em dash character. Use commas, parentheses, or a regular hyphen instead.

facts.title: War Room hours
facts.body: The War Room is open Monday through Friday from 11:15 AM to 7:00 PM ARG. It is closed Saturdays and Sundays.

facts.title: War Room breakout room
facts.body: Once users enter the War Room, they must join the breakout room called Stargazer - Team.

facts.title: Step 0 Cursor access
facts.body: Contributors who passed the courses and are now EQ or see the project as ineligible should come to the War Room to request Cursor access. This is step 0 of the project guideline.
